item.title: I lint-scanned 36 popular MCP servers. A third of them are failing your agent.
item.description: Your MCP server can be 100% spec-compliant and still be unusable by an agent. I built mcpgrade to measure the difference — then pointed it at 36 popular servers.

item.title: Designing tools LLMs can actually use: five failure modes I keep seeing
item.description: Your tool API can be perfectly engineered and still confuse every model that touches it. Field notes on why, from someone who integrates agent tools for a living.

item.title: Why this blog exists
item.description: Production AI agents fail in ways that never show up in demos. Someone should write those down.
